core_mechanism: An exact coupling/correspondence that represents a parity-constrained random configuration (configurations restricted to the even-degree / cycle subspace over GF(2)) as a projection of a correlated bond ensemble (a random-cluster / percolation-type measure), exhibiting a sharp critical threshold in the coupling parameter tied to the dual measure's critical point
brief_reason: The abstract obtains the random even subgraph from a random-cluster measure on the graph and locates a phase transition at 1/2 p_c fixed by the q=2 random-cluster critical point on the dual lattice, i.e. a parity-constrained ensemble expressed through a percolation-type measure with a sharp threshold.
